hero.subtitle: Rising from Baku's Halfmoon, on a shoreline destined for the world. Experience luxury reimagined.

heroForm.title: Make Your Choice Now
heroForm.subtitle: Register to receive personalized information about apartment sizes and prices.
heroForm.privacyText: By clicking, you agree to our.

vision.desc: We build for those who see beyond today. For visionaries who know the future isn't given, it's created. Rising from Baku's Halfmoon island, Reportage Heights is not just a building, it is your signature.
vision.descMobile: We build for those who see beyond today. For visionaries who understand that true luxury is found in the intersection of form and purpose.
vision.feature1Desc: Every unit offers a curated view of the Caspian Sea and Baku skyline.
vision.feature2Desc: A fluid, modern aesthetic that redefines the Baku Halfmoon coastline.

experience.title: Virtual Reality Tour.
experience.desc: Step inside our meticulously crafted Studio and 1-Bedroom apartments. Experience every detail in stunning high-definition 360° virtual reality.
experience.descMobile: Step inside our meticulously crafted Studio and 1-Bedroom apartments through a cutting-edge virtual reality walkthrough.

amenities.desc: Experience a lifestyle designed for the visionary. From relaxation to retail, everything you need is within reach.
amenities.descMobile: Experience a lifestyle designed for the visionary. From relaxation to active pursuits, every detail is considered.

gallery.title: A Shoreline Destined for the World.
gallery.desc: Rising from Baku's Halfmoon island, Reportage Heights offers a lifestyle that balances the vibrant energy of the city with the serene pull of the Caspian.
gallery.descMobile: Rising from Baku's Halfmoon island, Reportage Heights offers a lifestyle where the sea meets sophistication.
gallery.card1Desc: Every sea view is a vow, growing richer with time as the horizon unfolds before you.
gallery.card2Desc: Fluid marks inspired by the natural flow of waves, reflecting a modern and fluid mark of distinction.
gallery.card3Desc: Perfectly positioned within the Halfmoon island, connecting you to the very best of Baku's vibrant waterfront.

about.label: About Reportage Group
about.descPart1: Reportage Group has been proudly operating since 2014 as one of the largest private real estate developers in United Arab Emirates with projects spanning the UAE, USA, Egypt, Turkey, Saudi Arabia, Uganda, Azerbaijan, Pakistan, and more international markets on the way.
about.descBold1: Our focus is clear and consistent:
about.descPart2: to deliver innovative, sustainable and accessible modern housing solutions that provide outstanding value for investors and a safe, welcoming home for everyone
about.descPart3: is to be among the most trusted real estate companies in the world, developing homes that are both modern and attainable while fostering a true sense of belonging. We're excited for what the future holds and remain committed to expanding our footprint across the globe.

form.title: Secure Your Horizon.
form.subtitle: Leave your details below and our sales team will contact you shortly.
form.subtitleMobile: Leave your details below and our sales team will contact you to schedule a private viewing.
